name: Chicken Avocado Melt
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove skin and bones from chicken breasts.
2. On a hard surface, pound each chicken breast to 1/4 inch thickness using a meat mallet or similar flattening tool.
3. In a shallow dish, mix together cornstarch, cumin, and garlic salt.
4. Dip each piece of chicken into the mixture, coating evenly.
5. In another small bowl, beat egg with water.
6. Place cornmeal in a separate bowl.
7. First dip the coated chicken into the beaten egg, then coat it thoroughly with cornmeal.
8. Heat oil in a large frying pan over medium heat.
9. Add chicken to the hot oil and cook for 2 minutes on each side until golden brown.
10. Remove chicken from the pan and place it in a shallow baking dish.
11. Arrange avocado slices over the chicken and sprinkle cheese evenly.
12. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for about 15 minutes, or until a fork easily pierces the chicken and the cheese has melted.
13. Top each serving with equal amounts of sour cream, chopped green onion, and red bell pepper.
